name: undefined_mux_all_ports
description: Code should include a multiplexer where the output and at least two data inputs are all connected to undefined values (1'bx or 1'x), creating a degenerate MUX that causes treeification stalls in muxcover

name: undefined_select_with_disconnected_output
description: Code should include a multiplexer where the select input is valid but the output is disconnected (undefined), potentially causing stalls in optimization passes that propagate undefined values

name: multiplexer_x_operands
description: Code should include a ternary expression or mux where both branch operands and the result may be undefined, triggering undefined value propagation through select signal
snippet: wire [7:0] y = s ? a : 8'bx; // result undefined when s selects undefined branch
